1.gl: to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary)
1.kj: beacon, [idiom] altogether, be(-come), accomplished, committed, like), break, cause, come (to pass), do, faint, fall, [phrase] follow, happen, [idiom] have, last, pertain, quit (on

1.gl: David, the youngest son of Jesse
1.dv: rarely (fully); דָּוִיד; from the same as H1730 (דּוֹד); loving;

1.gl: intercession, supplication; by implication, a hymn

2.gl: properly, to bend or stoop in kindness to an inferior; to favor, bestow; causatively to implore (i.e. move to favor by petition)
2.kj: beseech, [idiom] fair, (be, find, shew) favour(-able), be (deal, give, grant (gracious(-ly), intreat, (be) merciful, have (shew) mercy (on, upon), have pity upon, pray, make suppli
[phrase] aloud, bleating, crackling, cry ([phrase] out), fame, lightness, lowing, noise, [phrase] hold peace, (pro-) claim, proclamation, [phrase] sing, sound, [phrase] spark, thun
2.dv: or קֹל; from an unused root meaning to call aloud;

2.gl: to shriek (from anguish or danger); by analogy, (as a herald) to announce or convene publicly
2.kj: assemble, call (together), (make a) cry (out), come with such a company, gather (together), cause to be proclaimed.

2.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
2.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

3.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
3.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
3.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

3.gl: properly, to front, i.e. stand boldly out opposite; by implication (causatively), to manifest; figuratively, to announce (always by word of mouth to one present); specifically, to expose, predict, explain, praise
3.kj: bewray, [idiom] certainly, certify, declare(-ing), denounce, expound, [idiom] fully, messenger, plainly, profess, rehearse, report, shew (forth), speak, [idiom] surely, tell, utter

3.gl: to spill forth (blood, a libation, liquid metal; or even a solid, i.e. to mound up); also (figuratively) to expend (life, soul, complaint, money, etc.); intensively, to sprawl out
3.kj: cast (up), gush out, pour (out), shed(-der, out), slip.

3.gl: tightness (i.e. figuratively, trouble); transitively, a female rival:
3.kj: adversary, adversity, affliction, anguish, distress, tribulation, trouble.

3.gl: a contemplation; by implication, an utterance
3.kj: babbling, communication, complaint, meditation, prayer, talk.

4.gl: to know (properly, to ascertain by seeing); used in a great variety of senses, figuratively, literally, euphemistically and inferentially (including observation, care, recognition; and causatively, instruction, designati
4.kj: acknowledge, acquaintance(-ted with), advise, answer, appoint, assuredly, be aware, (un-) awares, can(-not), certainly, comprehend, consider, [idiom] could they, cunning, declare,

4.gl: to walk (in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively)
4.kj: (all) along, apace, behave (self), come, (on) continually, be conversant, depart, [phrase] be eased, enter, exercise (self), [phrase] follow, forth, forward, get, go (about, abroad
4.dv: akin to H3212 (יָלַךְ); a primitive root;

4.gl: wind; by resemblance breath, i.e. a sensible (or even violent) exhalation; figuratively, life, anger, unsubstantiality; by extension, a region of the sky; by resemblance spirit, but only of a rational being (including it
4.kj: air, anger, blast, breath, [idiom] cool, courage, mind, [idiom] quarter, [idiom] side, spirit(-ual), tempest, [idiom] vain, (whirl-) wind(-y).

4.gl: thou and thee, or (plural) ye and you
4.dv: or (shortened); אַתָּ; or אַת; feminine (irregular) sometimes אַתִּי; plural masculine אַתֶּם; feminine אַתֶּן; or אַתֵּנָהlemma אתֵּנָה missing vowel

4.gl: to shroud, i.e. clothe (whether transitive or reflex.); hence (from the idea of darkness) to languish
4.kj: cover (over), fail, faint, feebler, hide self, be overwhelmed, swoon.

4.dv: or (feminine) נְתִיבָה; or נְתִבָה; (Jeremiah 6:16), from an unused root meaning to tramp;

5.gl: to see, literally or figuratively (in numerous applications, direct and implied, transitive, intransitive and causative)
5.kj: advise self, appear, approve, behold, [idiom] certainly, consider, discern, (make to) enjoy, have experience, gaze, take heed, [idiom] indeed, [idiom] joyfully, lo, look (on, one a

5.gl: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)
5.kj: any, appetite, beast, body, breath, creature, [idiom] dead(-ly), desire, [idiom] (dis-) contented, [idiom] fish, ghost, [phrase] greedy, he, heart(-y), (hath, [idiom] jeopardy of)

5.gl: properly, to scrutinize, i.e. look intently at; hence (with recognition implied), to acknowledge, be acquainted with, care for, respect, revere, or (with suspicion implied), to disregard, ignore, be strange toward, rejec
5.kj: acknowledge, [idiom] could, deliver, discern, dissemble, estrange, feign self to be another, know, take knowledge (notice), perceive, regard, (have) respect, behave (make) self str

5.gl: a non-entity; generally used as a negative particle
5.kj: else, except, fail, (father-) less, be gone, in(-curable), neither, never, no (where), none, nor, (any, thing), not, nothing, to nought, past, un(-searchable), well-nigh, without.
5.dv: as if from a primitive root meaning to be nothing or not exist;

5.gl: properly, to tread or frequent; usually to follow (for pursuit or search); by implication, to seek or ask; specifically to worship
5.kj: ask, [idiom] at all, care for, [idiom] diligently, inquire, make inquisition, (necro-) mancer, question, require, search, seek (for, out), [idiom] surely.

5.gl: properly, to wander away, i.e. lose oneself; by implication to perish (causative, destroy)
5.kj: break, destroy(-uction), [phrase] not escape, fail, lose, (cause to, make) perish, spend, [idiom] and surely, take, be undone, [idiom] utterly, be void of, have no way to flee.

6.kj: answer, appoint, avouch, bid, boast self, call, certify, challenge, charge, [phrase] (at the, give) command(-ment), commune, consider, declare, demand, [idiom] desire, determine, [

6.gl: alive; hence, raw (flesh); fresh (plant, water, year), strong; also (as noun, especially in the feminine singular and masculine plural) life (or living thing), whether literally or figuratively
6.kj: [phrase] age, alive, appetite, (wild) beast, company, congregation, life(-time), live(-ly), living (creature, thing), maintenance, [phrase] merry, multitude, [phrase] (be) old, qui

6.gl: thou and thee, or (plural) ye and you
6.dv: or (shortened); אַתָּ; or אַת; feminine (irregular) sometimes אַתִּי; plural masculine אַתֶּם; feminine אַתֶּן; or אַתֵּנָהlemma אתֵּנָה missing vowel

6.gl: to shriek (from anguish or danger); by analogy, (as a herald) to announce or convene publicly
6.kj: assemble, call (together), (make a) cry (out), come with such a company, gather (together), cause to be proclaimed.

6.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
6.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
6.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

6.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
6.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

7.gl: properly, vehemence, i.e. (with or without preposition) vehemently; by implication, wholly, speedily, etc. (often with other words as an intensive or superlative; especially when repeated)
7.kj: diligently, especially, exceeding(-ly), far, fast, good, great(-ly), [idiom] louder and louder, might(-ily, -y), (so) much, quickly, (so) sore, utterly, very ([phrase] much, sore),

7.gl: to be alert, physically (on foot) or mentally (in courage)
7.kj: confirm, be courageous (of good courage, stedfastly minded, strong, stronger), establish, fortify, harden, increase, prevail, strengthen (self), make strong (obstinate, speed).

7.gl: to snatch away, whether in a good or a bad sense
7.kj: [idiom] at all, defend, deliver (self), escape, [idiom] without fail, part, pluck, preserve, recover, rescue, rid, save, spoil, strip, [idiom] surely, take (out).

7.gl: to run after (usually with hostile intent; figuratively (of time) gone by)
7.kj: chase, put to flight, follow (after, on), hunt, (be under) persecute(-ion, -or), pursue(-r).

7.gl: to slacken or be feeble; figuratively, to be oppressed
7.kj: bring low, dry up, be emptied, be not equal, fail, be impoverished, be made thin.

7.gl: properly, a creaking (or shrill sound), i.e. shout (of joy or grief)
7.kj: cry, gladness, joy, proclamation, rejoicing, shouting, sing(-ing), triumph.
